Title: College can open Import calendar and upload a valid .ics
Preconditions: Signed in as college admin; Calendar page open; sample file docs/sample-import-july26.ics available
Test Steps:
1. Open /dashboard/college/calendar
2. Click Import (ICS)
3. Select sample-import-july26.ics
4. Keep default “from today onward”
5. Confirm import
Expected Result: Import succeeds; events for Jul 26–28 2026 appear on calendar; toast/success confirmation shown

Title: Dry-run / preview shows clash warnings when imported dates overlap placement drives
Preconditions: Campus has a placement drive on/near Jul 26; sample ICS ready
Test Steps:
1. Open Import ICS
2. Upload sample with Jul 26 events
3. Review preview/clash section before confirm (if shown) or after import banner
Expected Result: Clash summary mentions imported/holiday/exam vs placement drive; import can still complete

Title: Re-import same UID does not create duplicate rows
Test Steps:
1. Import the same .ics again
2. Count events for those dates / check DB source_uid
Expected Result: No duplicate events for same source_uid; count stable or update-in-place only

Title: Invalid / empty .ics is rejected with clear error
Test Steps: 1. Attempt import of empty file or non-ICS text renamed .ics
Expected Result: Error message; no calendar rows created

Title: Unified Export menu offers CSV and ICS for this month and full range
Preconditions: Calendar has at least one event
Test Steps:
1. Open calendar Export control
2. Confirm options: CSV this month, CSV full, ICS this month, ICS full
3. Download ICS this month
4. Open file in text editor
Expected Result: File downloads; begins with BEGIN:VCALENDAR; contains VEVENT rows for selected range

Title: ICS full export includes imported events
Test Steps:
1. Export ICS full
2. Search for an imported SUMMARY (e.g. Founders Day)
Expected Result: Imported event present in .ics output

Title: Delete imported removes only source_uid rows in selected range
Preconditions: Mix of placement_drive calendar rows and imported (source_uid) rows
Test Steps:
1. Open Delete imported
2. Choose date range covering Jul 26
3. Confirm delete
4. Refresh calendar
Expected Result: Imported events gone; manually created / placement_drive events remain

Title: Delete all imported clears every source_uid event for tenant
Test Steps:
1. Choose delete all imported
2. Confirm
3. Filter category Imported
Expected Result: Imported category empty; other categories still show events

Title: Filter All / Placement / Imported / Programs changes visible events
Preconditions: Calendar has placement, imported, and program-type items (or at least two categories)
Test Steps:
1. Select Imported — only imported rows
2. Select Placement — drive-related
3. Select All — union
Expected Result: List/month view matches filter; no crash; empty state when none match

Title: Clash banner surfaces placement vs imported blocking dates
Preconditions: Imported blocking/holiday/exam overlaps a drive date
Test Steps:
1. Open calendar with overlapping data
2. Observe clash banner / warnings
Expected Result: Banner lists clash with imported item labeled clearly; actionable or informational copy shown

Title: Non-college roles cannot call calendar import/export/imported APIs
Test Steps:
1. POST /api/college/calendar/import as student
2. GET /api/college/calendar/export as employer
Expected Result: 401/403; no data mutation

Title: Feature Ideas appears under college Communication & Support and loads
Preconditions: Migration 114 applied; college admin session (e.g. admin@iitm.edu)
Test Steps:
1. Sign in as college admin
2. Open Communication & Support → Feature Ideas
3. Or open /dashboard/college/feature-ideas
Expected Result: Page loads with status/topic filters, Submit Idea, and list (or empty state)

Title: Submit idea with title, description, and topic(s)
Test Steps:
1. Click + Submit Idea
2. Enter title and description
3. Select 1–3 topics
4. Submit
Expected Result: Success dialog (“Idea submitted”); idea appears in list with Pending approval; author auto-upvoted (vote_count ≥ 1)

Title: Submit blocked without topic or empty title/description
Test Steps:
1. Clear topics
2. Attempt submit
3. Retry with blank title
Expected Result: Validation warning/error; no new row created

Title: College admin can upvote and remove vote on another idea
Preconditions: At least one idea from another user (or second college admin)
Test Steps:
1. Click vote chevron on an idea
2. Observe count +1 and voted state
3. Click again
Expected Result: Vote toggles; count increments then decrements; UI reflects voted_by_me

Title: Status and topic filters narrow the list; search finds by title
Test Steps:
1. Filter by New Feature topic
2. Filter by Pending approval
3. Search unique title fragment
Expected Result: Only matching ideas shown; counts in sidebar update from API aggregates

Title: Trending vs Newest sort order
Test Steps:
1. Sort Trending
2. Sort Newest
Expected Result: Trending orders by votes then recency; Newest by created_at desc

Title: Student/employer cannot open Feature Ideas or APIs
Test Steps:
1. Open /dashboard/college/feature-ideas as student
2. GET /api/college/feature-ideas as employer
Expected Result: Route blocked/redirect; API 401

Title: Feature Ideas menu not shown for student/employer
Test Steps: 1. Inspect sidebar menus
Expected Result: No Feature Ideas entry; Feedback may still exist where shared

Title: db:clear-placement deletes all notifications (Alerts)
Preconditions: At least one in-app notification exists; .env.local DATABASE_URL set
Test Steps:
1. Note Alerts count in UI or DB
2. Run npm run db:clear-placement
3. Confirm terminal After: Alerts (notifications): 0
4. Hard-refresh /dashboard/alerts
Expected Result: Inbox and trash empty; terminal lists Alerts line

Title: db:clear-placement deletes audit_logs
Preconditions: audit_logs has rows; college Audit Reports previously showed activity
Test Steps:
1. Run npm run db:clear-placement
2. Check After: Audit logs: 0
3. Open college Audit Reports
Expected Result: Audit log list empty / zero rows

Title: Non-core college tenants deleted; seed campuses retained
Preconditions: At least one registration/test college exists besides seed slugs
Test Steps:
1. Run npm run db:clear-placement
2. Read “Test colleges to delete” and “Remaining colleges”
3. Verify seed campuses still present
Expected Result: Only core seed colleges remain (iit-madras, nit-trichy, bits-pilani, jadavpur, vit, dtu, iiith); test tenants gone

Title: Core users/students/employers on seed campuses survive clear
Test Steps:
1. Run clear-placement
2. Sign in as admin@iitm.edu and hr@techcorp.com
Expected Result: Login succeeds; jobs/drives cleared but accounts intact
Test Data / Notes: May need restore demo tie-ups after wipe

Title: Before/After snapshot prints Alerts and Audit logs counts
Test Steps:
1. Run npm run db:clear-placement
2. Inspect console output
Expected Result: Lines include “Alerts (notifications)” and “Audit logs” in Before and After blocks

Title: Seed college tenant names end with (Demo)
Test Steps:
1. Sign in as IITM college admin
2. Observe hub/header tenant name
3. Check college list / partnership UIs showing tenant name
Expected Result: Name shows e.g. “Indian Institute of Technology, Madras (Demo)” — not bare name

Title: Re-running migrate 113 does not double-suffix
Test Steps:
1. npm run db:migrate:113 again
2. SELECT name FROM tenants WHERE slug='iit-madras'
Expected Result: Still a single “ (Demo)” suffix

Title: College hub browser/page title uses “{TenantName} Home”
Test Steps:
1. Open college full-screen hub / home
2. Check document title or hub heading
Expected Result: Shows tenant name + Home (includes Demo suffix if present)

Title: Student hub title uses “{FirstName} — Home”
Test Steps:
1. Open student hub
2. Check title
Expected Result: First name then — Home

Title: Login demo chips for colleges show (Demo) in labels where updated
Test Steps:
1. Open /login
2. Inspect college admin / committee demo account names
Expected Result: Demo college labels include (Demo)

Title: Internal tools unlock page has show/hide password toggle
Test Steps:
1. Open /developer/unlock
2. Type a password
3. Click eye icon
4. Click again
Expected Result: Password revealed as text then masked again; aria-label updates Show/Hide

2. Click Unlock
Expected Result: Full navigation to /developer (or from= target); subsequent visit allowed via cookie
Test Data / Notes: Wolfe123@# / env override per team docs

2. Submit
